title.en: The legendary lords present were not stupid, an...

content.en:
Ye Tian came out of the long river of gray mist, and those legendary lords were dumbfounded when they saw that Ye Tian's copy body had not fallen.

"Oh my God, the clone of the Endless Lord didn't stay in the long river of gray mist and didn't fall, how did he do it?"

"The Gray Mist River will continue to attack us, if the will is flawed, or the will is not strong enough, it will not be able to stay for long, once the injury is too serious, it will not be able to break free from the Gray Mist River, and the strength of the Endless Lord will complete the Legendary Lord of the Realm.

"I guess the Endless Lord should have a treasure that can keep him from the invasion of the Gray Mist, right?"

"Since the Endless Lord is not afraid of the Grey Mist, why did he stay in the Grey Mist for so long before coming out?-"

The legendary lords present were not stupid, and quickly - guessed the reason.

Practice!

The Gray Mist River can assist in cultivation, temper the will, and even make up for the shortcomings, which is the real reason why Ye Tian stays in the Gray Mist River.

Many Legendary Lords had guessed the reason, but they didn't dare to go down, without him, just because they couldn't stay in the gray mist for long, and they couldn't have the effect of cultivation at all.

However, some of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords have flown into the Grey Mist, and they are sure to stay for a long time.

What's more, their willpower has long been sufficient, it's just flawed.

And it is too difficult to make up for the defects, and now they know that this gray mist river may help them temper their will to make up for the defects, even if the cost is great, they have to give it a try, as long as they make up for the flaws, they can pass the gray mist river, and they can also get another amazing treasure or opportunity.

......

Soon, Ye Tian passed through the long river of gray mist.

At this time, a treasure fell into Ye Tian's hands.

Here's a picture.

Ye Tian took a brief look, and his consciousness quickly sank into it.

In this picture, Ye Tian saw the fusion of all things, the fusion of will and innate eternal rules, and the fusion of will and innate eternal rules turned into the realm of volitional rules......

"It's ......"

Ye Tian was shocked, a small picture actually perfectly displayed the cultivation between the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm and the Legendary Lord of the Realm and even the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm.

What a realm it is that can be done!

It can be said that such a map is simply too high, and even if it is really a holy place, it will not be able to take out such a treasure map

"Could it be that everyone has such a treasure?"

Ye Tian wondered.

In fact, the treasures of other people were not as precious as his picture at all, and the blade was because he had broken through the long river of gray mist with the cultivation of the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm, so he had such an amazing reward.

Ye Tian was very excited.

With this picture, it would not be very difficult for him to step into the Realm Legendary Lord, and even his cultivation in the Realm Realm Legendary Lord Realm would be smooth all the way.

This picture alone is too valuable

In order to prevent his copy body from falling in the next level, Ye Tian condensed another copy body with this picture and did not go to the next level, while this copy body continued to move forward.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the position of the next level.

Here, he met several Realm Legendary Lords, some Transcendental Realm Lords, and several half-step Legendary Realm Lords, but the Frostless Lord was not here, and it was obvious that the Frostless Lord had passed this level.

This level is the sea of fire, the gray sea of fire.

After inquiry, Ye Tian knew about the situation of this level.

This place is called the sea of gray mist and fire, and it must pass through the sea of gray mist and fire to be regarded as passing, and the sea of gray fog and fire is aimed at the body, the body is not strong enough, once you enter the sea of gray fog and fire, the body will be burned to ashes, almost instantaneous.

Before, there were already three Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords whose bodies were burned to ashes, and there was no way to heal, even if they fell here, even if they were clones, the loss was not small.

Even the body of the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord couldn't withstand the Gray Mist and Fire Sea, and the Realm Realm Legendary Lord couldn't even count on it.

"I'm afraid I'm sad to pass this level!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Of course, he won't give up either.

On the other side, Ye Tian's copied body was using that diagram to fully comprehend and cultivate, striving to improve his cultivation to the realm realm of Legendary Lord as soon as possible.

Two ordinary Eternal Dao Dacheng, plus the entry Gray Mist Eternal Dao, the will has also reached the fifth order, and the actual Ye Tian is qualified to impact the realm of the realm of the legendary lord, provided that he can condense the realm of the will rule.

And the process of going from the Legendary Lord of the Perfection Realm to the Condensing Will Rule Realm was a long one.

If there was no aid from that map, if Ye Tian wanted to condense the Will's Rule Realm, he would need at least tens of millions of eternal years, or even longer.

But now that he has that treasure map, Ye Tian is sure that within 100,000 eternal years, he will condense the realm of will rules.

"Let's not go through this third level first, focus on cultivation, and impact the Realm Legendary Lord, only when I break through to the Realm Realm Legendary Lord, will my body usher in another qualitative change, and only then can I hope to break through the sea of gray mist and fire." Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, 100,000 eternal years passed.

.........

For such a long time, none of the legendary lords who were stopped had broken through, and they were still entangled here.

At this time, Ye Tian had already fused his will and the innate eternal rules outside his body to a certain extent, and he was about to condense the realm of will rules.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!

A terrifying force of will and rules spread from Ye Tian's body, permeating the surrounding endless territory, gradually forming a domain.

In this realm of will rules, Ye Tianneng made the rules dissipate with one thought, and reborn heaven and earth with one thought.

In the realm of will rules, one and another heaven and earth began to be born, and some uninhabited heaven and earth were turned into ashes under Ye Tian's thoughts.

Time and space have stopped, and the source sea has stopped running

This is the power of the realm of rules of will!

Not only that, Ye Tian's body also began to transform, and the endless source sea origin energy poured into his body, helping him to promote his body to truly complete the transformation.

At this time, Ye Tian's body was transforming, and the other five major replicating bodies were also breaking through and transforming.

In front of the sea of gray fog and fire.

Those Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords and several half-step Legendary Realm Legendary Lords all looked at Ye Tian with some surprise.

"I remember that it didn't take long for the Endless Lord to join the True Void Holy Land, he was just an Origin Realm Legendary Lord at the beginning, and he was promoted to a Realm Realm Legendary Lord in such a short time?"

This kind of cultivation speed is too demonic, it completely breaks their cognition nine. _
